prompt: A [food market type] at [time of day] — [lens] wide from a position within the market, the depth of the market extending into the background, [market stall type] establishing the market's identity in the foreground, [population type] moving through the market at their own pace, [light quality] the specific light of this market at this hour — artificial, natural, or mixed — [atmospheric detail] adding visual texture, documentary food market still, 16:9 Create this as a simple cinematic thumbnail still for a prompt library card. Clean single-scene composition. Readable at small size. Strong central subject. No text, no interface chrome, no split panels, no collage, no before-after comparisons.
negative_prompt: text overlay, typography, UI chrome, dashboard, website layout, collage, split screen, diptych, triptych, before-and-after, watermark, logo, cluttered composition, too many objects, cartoon, illustration, duplicate objects, warped geometry, unreadable tiny details

settings.lighting: clean, readable, high-contrast lighting suited for a small homepage or library card
settings.camera_angle: single clear hero framing that matches the prompt
settings.depth_of_field: moderate depth of field for thumbnail readability
settings.quality: clean silhouette, realistic materials, readable at small size
